arts.ttl: ‘I would sign no matter what’ - Hansi Flick sends message to future Barcelona targets
arts.sum: Hansi Flick was asked about the Brazilian’s quotes and said he would sign for Barça “no matter what” if he was a player, and hopes that the situation will serve as motivation for the team to become even more united going forward. “I don’t know [about Raphinha’s] comments, what I can say is that I am sure that when I was in this situation, I know the club and I know perfectly well what is happening, how immense this club is and the people who are around you, I think I would sign no matter what.
